title: strophanthus schultzei
intro: Strophanthus schultzei is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the Schoenlein's Strophanthus or Strophanthus schoenleinii. It is a climbing plant native to tropical Africa, particularly in the regions of Cameroon and the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help in the treatment of cardiovascular diseases and hypertension. The herbal preparations of Strophanthus schultzei, including the leaves, roots, and seeds, are typically used in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions to provide relief from various health issues, including edema and high blood pressure.
